blended.narrative: Calabogie Peaks is looking at a solid round of snow over the next 48 hours, with 9 inches of wet, heavy snow expected. Snow levels around 8,531 ft. Looking ahead, 25 inches possible over the next 14 days.

daily_summary.narrative: Tomorrow: 8" of snow, highs of 35°F. Expect wet, heavy snow.
Sunday: 3.7" of snow, highs of 26°F. Expect powder.
Monday: 9" of heavy snow, highs of 29°F. Expect powder.
